title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 1975 (23.10.1975)
text: 2j86 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Sue. 3(1)1 PRINTED BY THE GENERAL MANAGER. GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, MINTO ROAD, TIETA DELHI AND PUBIJSTiro VT THI CONTROLLED OF PUBUCATION8. DKI.HT, 197fi -- 1 of 3 -- REGISTERED No. D-(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II-Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 394] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, OCTOBER 23,1975/KARTIKA 1,1897 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd October 1975 G.S.R. 537(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Third Amendment) Rules, 1975. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In rule 6 of the Passports Rules, 1967, in the second proviso, for clause (i), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:— "(i) furnishes to the passport authority documentary evidence to establish that he has sufficient means to maintain himself abroad; or" [No. VI/401/53/71] J. S. MEHTA. Addl. Secy.
